name: SecAFS Chat
description: Per-conversation FUSE-mounted workspace backed by SecAFS.

postgresUrl.description: PostgreSQL URL for SecAFS; required only when manageDaemon is true.

socketPath.description: Override for the Unix socket path of secafs serve api. Default: $XDG_RUNTIME_DIR/secafs/secafs.sock

manageDaemon.description: If true, openclaw spawns and manages secafs serve api as a child process.

mountRoot.description: Host-side parent directory for per-conversation FUSE mount targets.
